more.title: More
more.subtitle: Manage your account information
more.signOutDescription: Are you sure you want to sign out? You'll need to sign in again to access your account.

pinSetup.benefitLine: Use it for quick access when you return. You’ll still use your password if you sign out fully.

pinDialog.createDescription: Choose a 4-digit PIN for quick access when you open the app again. After idle lock, enter your PIN instead of your password. You’ll still sign in with your password if you log out.
pinDialog.changeDescription: Enter your current PIN, then choose a new 4-digit PIN.
pinDialog.errorBothFields: Enter a 4-digit PIN in both fields.
pinDialog.errorNewBothFields: Enter a new 4-digit PIN in both fields.
pinDialog.errorNewSameAsOld: New PIN must be different from your current PIN.

pinLock.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).
pinLock.tooManyAttemptsOne: Too many attempts. Try again in 1 minute.
